Course Title: AI for Site Safety Monitoring: Blind Spots
Category: Infrastructure & Construction: Construction, Engineering, Building Materials, Real Estate Development
Who is this for: Construction site managers, safety managers, health and safety officers, project managers, site supervisors, safety coordinators, construction superintendents
Team or Dept this is for: Health and Safety, Construction Operations, Project Management, Site Management, Risk Management
Description: When AI fails to detect hazards or unsafe behaviour.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with construction site operations and a general awareness of health and safety principles are all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key limitations of AI-powered safety monitoring systems on construction sites and explain why certain hazards or unsafe behaviours may go undetected. You will also apply practical strategies to address these blind spots, ensuring that human oversight and AI tools work together to maintain a safer working environment.
